Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/47c8c8894e6d52064a30dcf8073399ecc5b30cb68a7e2a1612fbd8595c04487f/56f14679-b65e-49dc-bb5f-ec2ec182c683/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
